message:
chore: update audit index (batches 478-479) and sync beads issue tracker

audit_index.jsonl:
- Record batch 478-479 audit entries from SapphireHill agent covering
  console unicode width, postgres SCRAM/TLS, sqlite rollback, HTTP pool
  state guards, happy eyeballs timeout, TCP deadline, kafka transaction
  phases, WAL GC, task inspector heuristic, browser storage capabilities,
  scheduler stale entry skip, and notify spurious wakeup rewrite.

.beads/issues.jsonl:
- Sync beads state with completed and in-progress work items from
  concurrent agent sessions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
